production.summary: 3M announced it has joined a new multi-source agreement (MSA) coalition with leading technology companies to establish open, interoperable specifications for expanded beam optical (EBO) connectivity in AI data centers, aiming to advance and scale optical connections.
production.facility_or_line: Expanded Beam Optical (EBO) interconnect technology production
production.change_type: Shift in production capacity / New product line focus
production.why_it_matters: Increased focus on AI data center optical connections will drive demand for specialized materials, components, and testing equipment for manufacturing and quality control of EBO technology.

ai_summary: 3M is collaborating on new optical connectivity standards for AI data centers, signaling a strategic focus on advanced materials and high-tech manufacturing. This initiative suggests increased R&D and production needs for specialized chemicals, testing equipment, and cleanroom supplies. Lab supply teams should engage to support their evolving material science and manufacturing process requirements.
